name: ExtensionTestPlan_Copyright
title: R5: Use and/or publishing restrictions (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestPlan.copyright` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestPlan.copyright` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `TestPlan.copyright` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestPlan.copyright` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.
Element `TestPlan.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `TestPlan.copyright` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.
Element `TestPlan.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A copyright statement relating to the test plan and/or its contents. Copyright statements are generally legal restrictions on the use and publishing of the test plan. The short copyright declaration (e.g. (c) '2015+ xyz organization' should be sent in the copyrightLabel element.
